title: Add a 'crossboard view' as a 'favourite' to see other people's workload, across boards.
excerpt: It would be useful to be able to favourite a cross board view of a team member. As their manager then I can then see their workload across all boards quickly and know if they have capacity to take on more work or to allo…

posts.author: NJ525 (Nikki McFarland)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be useful to be able to favourite a cross board view of a team member. As their manager then I can then see their workload across all boards quickly and know if they have capacity to take on more work or to allocate the work to someone else.
